name: hud_ui_text_label_measure_text_width
description: HudUiTextLabel::MeasureTextWidth returns the measured width from zImage_Font::MeasureString for the label text and font handle.
known_limits: Depends on zImage_Font::MeasureString, which is functionally accepted but remains binary-safe debt.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?MeasureTextWidth@HudUiTextLabel@@QAEHXZ at 0x4bcdc0 still fails: 39 unmasked mismatches, 2 relocation bytes masked, 3 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 35 bytes and the VC object symbol is 48 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows local width/line-advance outputs passed to zImage_Font::MeasureString, then returns the width local.
The native text-label smoke validates width-driven centering through UpdateTextExtents.
